title: spermacoce basalis
intro: Spermacoce basalis, also known as the "Kadukkari" or "Eclipta," is a medicinal plant native to tropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Spermacoce basalis is typically prepared as a decoction or powder in traditional Ayurvedic medicine and is also used in herbal teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
